fixes.description: Eliminate any public unchecked routing entrypoint. _route_artifact_unchecked is underscore-prefixed, excluded from __all__, and documented as bypass-only. route_with_gate_evidence is the sole external entrypoint.

Detect indirect routing bypass at preflight. Adds detect_routing_bypass() with patterns for direct calls, imports, re-exports, public route_artifact aliases, and public route_artifact function definitions outside tlc_router.py. All findings carry reason_code=ROUTING_BYPASS_ATTEMPT.

Strengthen gate-evidence structural validation. Rejects empty/non-string eval_summary_id (INVALID_EVAL_SUMMARY_ID) and non-string gate_status (INVALID_GATE_STATUS_TYPE) before status-set membership checks.
Add tests/transcript_pipeline/test_replay_integrity_h01.py covering payload mutation, gate-evidence reuse, conditional gate upgrade, and unchecked-symbol bypass attempts.
Reject non-dict artifacts with INVALID_ARTIFACT_ENVELOPE before further validation; remove the silent None-coercion of artifact_type.
